output.sparql:
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT(YEAR(?born) AS ?birth_year) WHERE {
  wd:Q735776 wdt:P710 ?rider .
  ?rider wdt:P569 ?born .
  ?tour wdt:P31 wd:Q33881 .
  ?tour wdt:P710 ?rider .
  ?tour wdt:P580 ?start .
  FILTER(YEAR(?start) >= 1985 && YEAR(?start) <= 1989)
}
GROUP BY ?rider ?born
HAVING(COUNT(DISTINCT ?tour) = 4)

  wd:Q735776 wdt:P710 ?rider .

  ?tour wdt:P580 ?start .
